verification_gate: Every required object has a valid schema and example; relationships resolve; proof records the verified checksums and commands.
proof_summary: All 13 v0 object types named in schemas/index.json have a JSON Schema and a canonical example; every example validates against its schema via the ported minimal validator. Object-model relationships in 01_OBJECT_MODEL.md resolve to the same schema set.

live_commands.purpose: Validate examples against schemas, checksum spine docs 00..09, and evaluate this task's gate
